topics.title: Most People Ignore This — And Stay Broke
topics.description: This video explains a commonly ignored financial principle that keeps people poor. It includes examples from Warren Buffett, his investment philosophy, and relevant quotes to illustrate long-term thinking.

topics.title: You Think Saving Money Is Slow — Watch This
topics.description: take the reference of book 'the psychology of money' This video challenges the belief that saving is slow. It references Naval Ravikant’s ideas on wealth creation, leverage, and smart saving strategies.

topics.title: Starting Late Feels Fine — Until You See This
topics.description: This video highlights the cost of delaying investing using compounding examples and real-life scenarios.

topics.title: Keeping Cash Feels Safe — But It's Not
topics.description: This video explains inflation risk, purchasing power loss, and why holding cash can be dangerous over time.

topics.title: This Small Habit Can Change Your Financial Future
topics.description: This video focuses on one high-impact habit such as consistent investing or disciplined saving.

topics.title: You Won't Notice This Today — But It Will Cost You Years
topics.description: This video explains small financial mistakes that compound negatively over time.

topics.title: Saving Feels Pointless — Until This Happens
topics.description: This video demonstrates how savings create opportunities and financial security during unexpected events.

topics.title: This Is Why You're Not Getting Rich (Simple Truth)
topics.description: This video breaks down the key reasons people fail to build wealth, including mindset and behavior.

topics.title: The Biggest Money Mistake Feels Normal
topics.description: This video uncovers a common financial behavior that most people think is normal but is actually harmful.
